innovation_1.name: 三层角信号物理分解与几何材质特征提取机制
innovation_1.contribution_statement: We identify the fundamental physical root causes of traditional light field EPI hypothesis failures through a rigorous quantitative and theoretical validation framework.

innovation_2.name: 基于双掩码路由与域平衡采样的统一深度估计架构
innovation_2.contribution_statement: We propose a three-layer angular signal physical decomposition mechanism that successfully decouples complex light fields into intrinsic geometry and material features.

innovation_3.name: 光场EPI假设失效的物理根因定量分析与理论验证体系
innovation_3.contribution_statement: We demonstrate the effectiveness of these decoupled features by integrating them into a unified depth estimation architecture powered by dual-mask routing and domain-balanced sampling.
